title: Protein Packed Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A dense and flavorful Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb, unsalted pistachio, and a mother sauce base, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This high protein friendly recipe is cooked on a tava griddle.

ingredients.name: lamb
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the tava griddle to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, black pepper, cumin, and coriander.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Add the chopped onion to the bowl and mix until it is well coated with the remaining marinade.
Add the onion to the skewers, alternating with the lamb cubes.
Brush the tava griddle with a small amount of olive oil to prevent sticking.
Cook the kebabs on the tava griddle for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through.
While the kebabs are cooking, mix together tomato paste and 2 tablespoons of water in a small bowl.
Brush the tomato paste mixture onto the kebabs during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Sprinkle the chopped pistachio over the kebabs and serve hot.
